title: Business Settings
subtitle: Manage the business identity shown across the UI and printed invoices. ZATCA QR codes stay disabled until the required legal data is configured.
businessProfileDescription: These values are used across the UI and on invoices.
invoiceProfileDescription: VAT and CR remain optional. QR generation is enabled only when a valid VAT number is available.
vatNumberHint: Enter a 15-digit VAT number when the business is fully registered.
crNumberHint: Commercial registration is optional and will appear on invoices only when provided.
qrRequirementsDescription: Invoices can still render with business name and address while legal IDs are missing. QR generation is blocked until the VAT number is valid.
qrStatusReady: QR generation is ready. A valid business name and VAT number are present.
qrStatusMissing: QR generation is disabled until the business name and a valid 15-digit VAT number are saved.
optionalFieldsDescription: Arabic name, Arabic address, VAT number, and CR number can all be added later without blocking regular invoice rendering.
